ingredients_text: Vegetables (48%) [Potato, Sweet Potato, Broccoli), Sliced Pork (28%), Tuscan Gravy (17%) [Water, Gravy Powder (1%) (Contains Milk & Soybean), Chicken Flavoured Stock (Flavour Enhancer (635), Food Acid (330)), Tomato Paste (Contains Acidity Regulator (330)), Tuscan Seasoning (0.1%).
